intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How the Instagram Algorithm Works. Instagram uses multiple ranking systems across Feed, Stories, Reels, and Explore. Signals typically include relationship, interest, and timeliness — exact weights change, so treat explanations as models, not guar
mainSummary: Instagram uses multiple ranking systems across Feed, Stories, Reels, and Explore. Signals typically include relationship, interest, and timeliness — exact weights change, so treat explanations as models, not guarantees.
